## Affected Files

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Scenario is reproducible from a versioned config.
- [ ] Results are logged.
- [ ] Validation artifacts are generated.
- [ ] Interpretation is recorded in a docs note.

## Success Metrics

- The experiment can be rerun with the same command and seed set.
- The reported metrics are comparable to existing benchmark surfaces.
- The result is documented conservatively.

## Validation / Testing

- [ ] Run the canonical benchmark command.
- [ ] Confirm the output artifacts are created.
- [ ] Add or update a contract test for the benchmark surface.
